title: ACCESS CENTER - 211info
text: ACCESS CENTER ACCESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center offering limited respite from the elements, outreach programming, hygiene supplies, and other social supports. 1845 W 11th Street Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Age 18 and older experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday-Friday 1pm-4pm Email (541) 683-0836 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 683-0836 Main phone Main phone (541) 683-0836 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Homeless Drop In Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
